value.rationale: The page does not describe a Google-offered "Remote control (mobile / web)" feature. Instead, it documents a third-party, community-built open-source tool called "Porta" (and a separate project "Levitation") created by individual developers to enable mobile check-in and approval of Antigravity agent runs. These are unofficial companion apps, not a Google-provided offering. The page explicitly notes the tool "talks to your local Antigravity Language Server directly" and was built by a user who "kept wanting a way to check in on progress and approve actions from my phone." There is no mention of Google officially offering or announcing such a feature.
